title: ELLIOTT BAY BOOK - Updated June 2026 - Yelp

title: Elliott Bay Marina in Seattle, WA, United States - Phone Number
content: The marina is in excellent shape. Everyone was so friendly and the amenities are wonderful. We were the smallest boat there and everyone was kind and welcoming.
